name: Dhruv Ladani

projects.title: AI Interviewing Platform

experience.title: Product Development Projects

achievements: Defined product requirements and user stories for AI interviewing platform
Conducted user interviews to validate product-market fit

Collaborated across design and engineering functions

Full-stack development - understands user flows end-to-end
